activities.name: Beach Relaxation & Hotel Exploration
activities.description: After checking in, spend the afternoon relaxing on Miami Beach right outside your hotel. Enjoy the ocean views from your balcony and explore the hotel's beachfront amenities.

activities.name: Dinner at Ocean's Ten
activities.description: Enjoy fresh seafood and coastal cuisine at this popular Miami Beach restaurant with ocean views.

activities.name: Guided Snorkeling Excursion
activities.description: Half-day snorkeling adventure departing from Miami Beach. Explore vibrant coral reefs and tropical fish in the crystal-clear waters off the coast. All equipment, instruction, and transportation included.

activities.name: South Beach & Art Deco District Walk
activities.description: Stroll through the iconic Art Deco Historic District, visit Ocean Drive, and enjoy the vibrant atmosphere of South Beach. Stop for refreshments at a beachside café.

activities.name: Dinner at Juvia
activities.description: Rooftop dining experience with panoramic ocean views featuring fusion cuisine blending French, Japanese, and Peruvian flavors.

activities.name: Morning Beach Time & Brunch
activities.description: Final morning enjoying the beachfront and ocean views. Casual brunch at a local café before checkout.

plan.reasoning: This itinerary successfully meets all the specified requirements within the $1,400 budget. The plan includes: (1) Round-trip flights from Chicago to Miami totaling $510, (2) A beachfront hotel with ocean views (The Confidante Miami Beach) for 2 nights at $570, featuring an oceanfront room with balcony and direct beach access, (3) A guided snorkeling excursion on day 2 for $89, and (4) Additional activities including beach time, dining experiences, and exploring South Beach. The total cost of $1,384 stays within the $1,400 budget with $16 remaining for incidentals. The itinerary maximizes the traveler's interests in beachfront accommodations, ocean views, and snorkeling while providing a well-rounded Miami Beach experience over the 2-day trip.
plan.final_message_to_user:
I've created your perfect Miami Beach getaway! Your 2-day trip features a beachfront hotel with stunning ocean views (The Confidante Miami Beach) and includes an exciting snorkeling excursion. You'll stay in an Oceanfront King Room with a private balcony where you can wake up to beautiful ocean vistas. 

On Day 2, you'll embark on a half-day guided snorkeling adventure exploring the vibrant underwater world off Miami's coast. The itinerary also includes beach relaxation time, exploring the iconic South Beach Art Deco District, and dining at excellent restaurants with ocean views.

Total cost: $1,384 (within your $1,400 budget)
- Flights: $510
- Hotel (2 nights): $570
- Snorkeling excursion: $89
- Meals & activities: $215

You'll have $16 remaining for tips or additional expenses. Have a wonderful trip!
